title: MuteIt
description: Filters unwanted chat and HUD messages with custom keywords and lets you hide the scoreboard
body:
# MuteIt
![MuteIt Screenshot](https://imgur.com/x17P7lu.png)

**MuteIt** is a client-side mod that allows you to control the visibility of chat messages, filter HUD messages by keywords, and toggle the scoreboard.  
It uses **MidnightLib** for the configuration screen and also stores settings in a separate JSON config file.

---

## Features
- Enable or disable the mod completely
- Filter chat and HUD messages based on custom blocked words and phrases
- Toggle scoreboard visibility (default key: `B`)
- Maintain a list of blocked words (editable in the GUI or in `config/muteit.json`)
- Open the configuration screen with a keybind (default key: `K`)
- ModMenu integration (MidnightLib feature)
- Do not filter messages you send
- Languages : English, Russian

---

## Keybinds
- Fully configurable through the in-game keybind settings
- `B` — Toggle scoreboard visibility
- `K` — Open the settings screen

---

## Configuration
- Main settings are handled through **MidnightLib** (a new GUI is planned — the current ArrayList UI is temporary)
- Blocked words and filter settings are also synced with a JSON file
